title: aspidium manilense
intro: Aspidium manilense, also known as the Manilae or Manila fern, is a species of fern found in the tropical regions of Asia and is classified under the family Polypodiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Aspidium manilense include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. Traditionally, it is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be applied topically or consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
